entry.title: IDC GS00Q17NSD3000 (P01207) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Per Section G of the contract and FAR Subpart 16.505

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE AT&T CORPS. SUBMISSION NUMBER AT03642.02A DATED MAY 23, 2022. THE SUBMISSION ADDS ACCESS ARRANGEMENT PRICES TO THE CONTRACT.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: 40 U.S.C. 11314 - AUTHORITY TO ACQUIRE AND MANAGE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00Q17NSD3000 (P01211) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Per Section G of the contract and FAR Subpart 16.505

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE AT&T CORPS. SUBMISSION NUMBER AT03829.01A DATED JUNE 2, 2022. THE SUBMISSION UPDATES DOMESTIC PRIVATE LINE SERVICE GATEWAY TO OCONUS/NON-DOMESTIC COUNTRY/JURISDICTION RELATIONSHIP TABLE (B.4.1.11) ON THE CONTRACT.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: 40 U.S.C. 11314 - AUTHORITY TO ACQUIRE AND MANAGE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY

entry.title: IDC GS00Q17NSD3000 (P01212) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Per Section G of the contract and FAR Subpart 16.505

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO: EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD ONE AND EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FROM AUGUST 1, 2022 THROUGH JULY 31, 2027. CONFIRM THE NON-EPA APPLICABLE REFERENCE TABLES THAT HAD THE END DATES UPDATED TO 7/31/2027.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: 40 U.S.C. 11314 - AUTHORITY TO ACQUIRE AND MANAGE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE AT&T CORPS. SUBMISSION NUMBER AT03598.02A DATED JUNE 3, 2022. THE SUBMISSION ACCESS ARRANGEMENT (AA) PRICING NON-DOMESTIC MONTHLY RECURRING CHARGE (MRC) AND NON-RECURRING (NRC) PRICES TO THE CONTRACT.
